name: Meet The Dat
tagline: A fictional educational concept page that explains a playful science design idea with clear safety framing.
thesis: Meet The Dat is a classroom-style prototype that turns an imaginative prompt into a polished, shareable idea page while making the fictional boundary explicit. It preserves the existing single-page concept as an OpenAITPM idea route instead of occupying the production launchpad root.
audience: Students, parents, teachers, and creative builders who want a safe example of turning a rough concept into a customer-readable webpage.
proofPoints: The page keeps the concept explicitly fictional and educational.
The idea can be served at openAITpm.com/meet-the-dat without replacing the OpenAITPM root page.
The launch system preserves customer-facing copy, proof points, and next launch checks for the route.

launchChecks.label: Add bespoke illustrations or generated assets
